progressBar.title: This is your application fee progress bar. Complete each step to move forward.
progressBar.payApplicationFee: Pay the Application Fee to guarantee your scholarship.
progressBar.payScholarshipFee: Pay the Scholarship Fee to confirm your scholarship application.
progressBar.payPlacementFee: Pay the Placement Fee to proceed with your process.
progressBar.payI20Fee: Pay the I-20 Control Fee to start your I-20 and document validation process.
progressBar.daysRemaining: You have 10 days after the scholarship fee.

stepDescriptions.selection_fee: Pay the fee to unlock access to scholarships.
stepDescriptions.identity_verification: Verify your identity to continue the process.
stepDescriptions.selection_survey: Answer the selection questionnaire with at least 80% correct.
stepDescriptions.scholarship_selection: Choose the scholarships you want to apply for.
stepDescriptions.process_type: Inform your process type (Initial, Transfer, or COS).
stepDescriptions.documents_upload: Submit your passport, diploma, and proof of funds.
stepDescriptions.payment: Pay the enrollment fee to secure your spot.
stepDescriptions.scholarship_fee: Pay the scholarship fee to confirm your application.
stepDescriptions.university_documents: Submit the documents required by the university.
stepDescriptions.waiting_approval: Your documents are under review. 48h timeframe.
stepDescriptions.my_applications: Track your documents and acceptance letter.

onboarding.payFeeDesc: Start your process by paying the selection fee.
onboarding.chooseScholarshipsDesc: Select the universities and scholarships you are interested in.
onboarding.uploadDocumentsDesc: Upload your passport, diploma, and proof of funds.
onboarding.underReviewDesc: We are reviewing your documents. 48h timeframe.
onboarding.completedDesc: All set! Move to the next step.

stepByStepTour.title: Step-by-Step Tour
stepByStepTour.description: See the full application journey in detail.

selectionProcess.title: Selection Process
selectionProcess.description: Start your journey to American education by completing our comprehensive selection process.
selectionProcess.discountApplied: ✨ You have a discount coupon applied!
selectionProcess.sellerReferralCodeMessage: You cannot use Matricula Rewards codes because you registered with a seller referral code. This is a system restriction to prevent conflicts between different referral systems.
selectionProcess.sellerReferralCodeInfo: Seller referral code detected - Matricula Rewards not available
selectionProcess.pendingPaymentMessage: You have a Zelle payment pending verification. Please wait for approval before starting a new process.

welcomeMessage.title: Welcome to Support Chat!
welcomeMessage.body: Hello! This is your support chat. Our team is available to help you from 9 AM to 5 PM (Arizona Time Zone). You can ask questions about scholarships, documents, and your application progress. Feel free to send messages and attachments at any time!
welcomeMessage.hours: Support hours: 9 AM - 5 PM (Arizona Time Zone)

profileStatus.title: Profile Status
profileStatus.completeProfile: Complete your profile to unlock more opportunities

successTips.title: Success Tips
successTips.tip1: Apply early to increase your chances of success
successTips.tip2: Tailor your applications to each scholarship
successTips.tip3: Keep your profile updated with latest achievements

recentApplications.subtitle: Track your latest scholarship submissions
recentApplications.startJourneyMessage: Start your journey by browsing and applying to scholarships

findScholarships.title: Find Scholarships

featuredScholarships.title: Featured Scholarships
featuredScholarships.subtitle: These scholarships are prominently displayed and may have special benefits
featuredScholarships.checkBackLater: Check back later for highlighted opportunities

noResults.title: No scholarships found
noResults.description: Try adjusting your search criteria or clear filters to discover more opportunities.

selectedScholarships.title: Selected Scholarships
selectedScholarships.description: Here you can see all the scholarships you have selected for the application process. These are the programs you are interested in applying to. Follow the steps below to complete your application and start your journey toward studying abroad.
selectedScholarships.notSelectedYet: You haven't selected any scholarships yet. Browse our available programs and add them to your selection.

cartPage.title: Selected Scholarships
cartPage.description: Here you can manage your selected scholarships and proceed with the application process.
cartPage.removeBlockedScholarships: Remove the blocked scholarships above to continue
cartPage.notSelectedYet: You haven't selected any scholarships to apply for yet.
cartPage.documentsApproved: Documents Approved! Ready to proceed with payment.
cartPage.congratulations: Congratulations! Your documents have been approved.
cartPage.autoSelected: Your scholarship has been automatically selected for payment.
cartPage.selectOneScholarship: Please select one scholarship below to proceed with the application fee payment.
cartPage.completeApplication: Complete your application with the one-time fee
cartPage.securePayment: ✓ Secure payment • ✓ Instant confirmation • ✓ Full refund policy

studentTypeModal.title: What type of student are you?
studentTypeModal.initial: Initial (I am outside the US and need an F-1 student visa)
studentTypeModal.transfer: Transfer (I am already in the US with an F-1 visa and want to transfer schools)
studentTypeModal.changeOfStatus: Change of Status (I am in the US with another visa and want to change to student)

documentsAndScholarshipChoice.title: Application Process Setup
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.subtitle: Complete your student application process by selecting your status and uploading required documents
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.step1Title: What is your current status in the US?
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.step1Description: Please select your current immigration status to help us provide the best guidance for your application process.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.firstTimeF1Description: I am outside the US and need an F-1 student visa to study in America.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.schoolTransferDescription: I am already in the US with an F-1 student visa and want to transfer schools.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.statusChangeDescription: I am already in the US with another visa (e.g., tourist) and want to change my status to student.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.step2Description: Upload the required documents for your application.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.step2Important: IMPORTANT: All documents must be in English. If your documents are in another language, you can request certified translation through our partner Lush America.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.languageError: This document is not in English. Please provide an English version or certified translation.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.accessError: Unable to process {{documentType}}. The file may be corrupted or in an unsupported format. Please try uploading a new file.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.fundsDataError: Unable to validate proof of funds. The document may not contain clear bank balance information or be in an unreadable format. Please try uploading a clearer and more legible bank statement.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.currencyFieldError: Internal system error processing currency data in {{documentType}}. The document may not contain valid currency information or be in an unsupported format. Please try uploading a clearer document.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.passportFormatError: The passport document format is not recognized. Please upload a clear, undamaged passport photo.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.diplomaProcessError: Unable to process High School Diploma. The file may be corrupted or in an unsupported format. Please try uploading a new file.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.fundsValidationError: Unable to validate document. The file may be corrupted or in an unsupported format. Please try uploading a new file.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.passportMRZError: The passport document is not readable. Please ensure the passport is clearly visible and the machine-readable zone (MRZ) at the bottom is not damaged or obscured.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.bankStatementNotReadableError: The bank statement is not readable. Please ensure the document is clearly visible and all text is legible.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.diplomaNotReadableError: The diploma document is not readable. Please ensure the document is clearly visible and all text is legible.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.insufficientFundsError: Insufficient funds detected. The minimum required balance is $22,000 USD.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.diplomaDamagedError: The diploma appears to be damaged or unclear. Please upload a clear, undamaged copy.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.passportDescription: Upload a clear photo or scan of your passport.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.diplomaDescription: Upload your high school diploma or equivalent.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.fundsProofDescription: Upload bank statements or financial documents. A minimum of $22,000 USD is required, plus $5,000 USD for each dependent.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.dragDropFiles: Drop files or click to select
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.onlyPdfSupported: Only PDF files are supported for multiple documents
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.onlyPdfAllowed: Only PDF files are allowed for proof of funds
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.documentsApprovedDescription: Excellent! Your documents have been approved and you're ready to proceed with the application fee payment.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.analyzingOverlayDescription: This may take up to 40 seconds. Please do not close this window.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.manualReviewDescription: Our artificial intelligence was unable to identify all the necessary information in the submitted documents. Don't worry! Your documentation has been sent to our support team to perform a detailed analysis.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.manualReviewTimeframe: The analysis will be completed within 48 hours and you will receive the results via email.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.aiProcessingFailed: Our AI was unable to process the documents automatically.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.teamAnalysisMessage: Don't worry! We've sent them to our team for detailed analysis.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.smartAssistantDescription: Use the floating button on the corner of the screen to ask questions in real-time.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.supportChatDescription: Access the team chat right below the 'My Applications' section in the dashboard.

documentsUploadStep.title: Document Upload
documentsUploadStep.subtitle: We need some documents to verify your eligibility and process your application.
documentsUploadStep.importantNotice: Make sure that the submitted documents are clearly visible and legible. Also make sure that the submitted documents are exclusively in <boldUnderline>English</boldUnderline>, if you don't have the documents translated we recommend the document translation services of our partner <link>Lush America Translations</link>.

manualReview.title: Manual Document Review
manualReview.subtitle: Some of your documents need manual verification by the university. You can reattach the problematic files below or confirm that all information is accurate to proceed with manual review.
manualReview.reviewDocumentsDescription: Please review each document below and make any necessary corrections
manualReview.universityRequestedChanges: University requested changes for this document
manualReview.useCurrentFile: Use current file (uncheck to upload a new one)
manualReview.declarationText: I confirm that all the information and documents provided are accurate and true to the best of my knowledge. I understand that providing false information may result in the rejection of my application.

myApplications.title: My Applications
myApplications.subtitle: Track the progress of all your scholarship applications
myApplications.emailNotification: You will receive email notifications about your application status. Check your inbox regularly.

steps.step1Description: Upload passport, diploma and proof of funds

steps.step4Description: Complete enrollment and start your program

noApplications.title: No applications yet

paymentStatus.title: Payment Status

paymentStatus.placementFeeDescription: Final step to secure your placement and support

confirmationModal.title: Confirm Your Scholarship Selection
confirmationModal.description: By proceeding with this payment, you're making this your final scholarship choice. This action cannot be undone.
confirmationModal.willRemoveOthers: This will remove {{count}} other approved application:
confirmationModal.willRemoveOthersPlural: This will remove {{count}} other approved applications:

welcome.applicationInProgress: Your application to {{universityName}} is in progress.
welcome.description: Use the chat below to communicate directly with the university regarding pending documents and next steps.

documentRequests.title: Check Document Requests
documentRequests.description: Upload the documents requested by the university to continue your process.
documentRequests.acceptanceLetterDescription: Your acceptance letter has been sent by the university. Go to the Documents tab to view it.

applicationDetails.title: View Application Details
applicationDetails.description: Check scholarship information, documents, and current application status.

i20ControlFee.title: Pay I-20 Control Fee
i20ControlFee.description: Pay the I-20 Control Fee to request your official document. Deadline: 10 days after acceptance letter.
i20ControlFee.paidMessage: Congratulations! The I-20 Control Fee has been paid successfully.
i20ControlFee.paidDescription: Your payment has been confirmed. Continue tracking your application progress.

chat.title: Application Chat
chat.subtitle: Communicate directly with the university
chat.messageError: Error sending message. Please try again.
chat.noMessages: No messages yet. Start a conversation!

guide.title: Chat with the support team
guide.subtitle: This chat connects you directly with the support team. Use it for questions about scholarships, documents, and your application progress. Avoid sharing sensitive data (passwords or card numbers).

studentInformation.title: Student Information
studentInformation.changeOfStatusFromOtherVisa: Change of Status - From Other Visa

i20ControlFee.title: I-20 Control Fee
i20ControlFee.description: The I-20 is the official Certificate of Eligibility issued by the university that proves your student status in the USA.
i20ControlFee.deadlineInfo: Deadline: 10 days after Scholarship Fee payment.
i20ControlFee.paymentInfo: Ensures proper I-20 processing by the university.
i20ControlFee.deadlineExpired: The deadline to pay the I-20 Control Fee has expired!

paymentSuccess.title: I-20 Control Fee Paid Successfully!
paymentSuccess.description: Your I-20 Control Fee payment has been processed successfully. The university will now process your acceptance letter.
nextStepsList: Wait for the university to process your acceptance letter
Your acceptance letter will appear in the Documents tab once ready
Contact the support chat if you have any questions about the process

congratulations.title: Congratulations! All documents have been approved!
congratulations.subtitle: Your documentation has been accepted by the university. You can now proceed to the next step.

acceptanceLetter.title: Acceptance Letter
acceptanceLetter.description: Your official acceptance letter from the university.
acceptanceLetter.status: Waiting for the university to send the official acceptance letter
acceptanceLetter.readyForDownload: Your official acceptance letter is ready for download
acceptanceLetter.pendingI20Description: Your acceptance letter will be available after you complete the I-20 Control Fee payment. Once the payment is confirmed and the university processes your acceptance letter, it will appear here for download.
acceptanceLetter.paymentRequiredDescription: Your acceptance letter has been sent by the university. To view and download it, please complete the I-20 Control Fee payment.
acceptanceLetter.waitingForUniversityDescription: Your I-20 Control Fee has been paid successfully. The university is now processing your acceptance letter. It will appear here once they send it to you.

documentStatus.title: Document Status
documentStatus.description: Continue submitting the documents requested by the university. The acceptance letter will be available only after all documents are approved.

passport.label: Passport
passport.description: A valid copy of the student's passport. Used for identification and visa purposes.

diploma.label: High School Diploma
diploma.description: Proof of high school graduation. Required for university admission.

funds_proof.label: Proof of Funds
funds_proof.description: A bank statement or financial document showing sufficient funds for study.

hardcodedTexts.followSteps: Follow these steps to complete your application
hardcodedTexts.completeI20Payment: Complete the I-20 control fee payment to proceed with your application

noApplication.title: No Application Found
noApplication.description: You don't have an active application yet. Please go back to the previous step or contact support.

welcome.almostDone: You're almost there! In this final step, you can review the details of the university you chose and submit the required documentation. Once everything is in order, your Acceptance Letter will be available right here for you to download.
welcome.mentorsReady: Our mentors are ready to help with any questions about this process.

details.internalFeesNote: These fees are reported by the university and paid directly to them. They are not part of Matricula USA's mentoring service.

documents.title: Document Submission
documents.subtitle: Submit the documents requested by the university for review and final approval.

acceptance.description: The Acceptance Letter is the official document issued by the university confirming your admission. It contains important details about your program and is essential for the visa process.
acceptance.officialNote: This document is officially issued by the university after reviewing your documentation.
acceptance.readyToDownload: Your acceptance letter is ready to download!

messages.userNotAuthenticated: User not authenticated. Please log in again.

forms.title: Title
forms.transferFormDescriptionSchool: Upload the transfer form for this student. Only visible for transfer students.
forms.transferFormDescriptionStudent: Your university will upload your transfer form here. Download it when available.
forms.transferFormReadyMessage: Your transfer form is ready for download. Download it, fill it out, and send it back to the university.
forms.errorDownloadingDocument: Error downloading document. Please try again.
forms.errorViewingDocument: Error viewing document. Please try again.
forms.enrolledMessage: You have been enrolled! Check your dashboard for next steps.
forms.documentRequestsDescription: Now that you've reached this stage, you must review and upload the documents requested by your university to continue your process. After this, the school will be able to analyze your application and send your acceptance letter.
forms.acceptanceLetterInstructions: The university will send your acceptance letter here when it's ready. Once uploaded, you will be automatically enrolled.

modals.rejectionExplanation: Explain the reason for rejecting this document. The student will see this message.
modals.rejectionExplanationPlaceholder: Ex.: The document is cut off. Please send it again in PDF with all pages.

noPhotoFound.title: Identity Verification

approved.title: Identity Photo Approved
approved.message: Your identity photo has been approved. You can proceed with your application.

rejected.title: Identity Photo Rejected
rejected.message: Your identity photo has been rejected. Please review the reason and upload a new photo.

pending.title: Identity Photo Under Review
pending.message: Your identity photo is currently under review by our administrators.

uploadNewPhoto.title: Upload New Identity Photo

uploadNewPhoto.scrollToBottom: Please scroll to the bottom to continue
uploadNewPhoto.acceptTerms: I have read and accept the terms and conditions
uploadNewPhoto.successMessage: Identity photo uploaded successfully! It will be reviewed by an administrator.

errors.loadingStatus: Error loading verification status. Please try again.

matriculaRewards.title: Matricula Rewards
matriculaRewards.subtitle: Earn credits by referring friends to MatriculaUSA
matriculaRewards.visitStoreDescription: Visit our rewards store to exchange your coins for tuition discounts
matriculaRewards.shareCodeToEarn: Share your code to start earning coins
matriculaRewards.transactionHistory: Your transaction history will appear here
matriculaRewards.step1Description: Share your unique referral code with friends and family
matriculaRewards.step2Title: They pay the selection process fee
matriculaRewards.step2Description: When they use your code and pay the selection process fee, you earn coins
matriculaRewards.step3Description: When referred pays the I-20 Control Fee, you earn 180 coins.
matriculaRewards.nudgeCooldown: Please wait {{minutes}} min before notifying again
matriculaRewards.universitiesDescription: These universities accept Matricula coins as tuition discounts. Click on a university to see more details.
matriculaRewards.universitiesNotParticipating: Universities need to opt-in to the Matricula Rewards program to accept coins for tuition discounts.
matriculaRewards.importantInfoText: If your university is not listed above, it means they haven't opted to participate in the Matricula Rewards program yet. You can still earn coins by referring friends, but you won't be able to redeem them for tuition discounts at your university until they join the program. Consider reaching out to your university's admissions office to encourage them to participate!
matriculaRewards.searchUniversities: Search universities by name, location, or type...
matriculaRewards.shareDescription: Use the buttons below to quickly share your code

customRedemption.customRedemptionSuccessEnrolled: Successfully redeemed custom ${{amount}} tuition discount for your enrolled university: ${{university}}!

rewardsStore.chooseUniversity: Choose the university where you want to apply the tuition discount of

rewardsStore.searchUniversitiesPlaceholder: Search universities by name or location...
rewardsStore.onlyParticipatingUniversities: Only universities that have opted to participate in the Matricula Rewards program are shown here. If your university is not listed, it means they haven't joined the program yet. You can still earn coins by referring friends, but you won't be able to redeem them for tuition discounts at your university until they participate. Consider reaching out to your university's admissions office to encourage them to join!

howItWorks.title: How Matricula Rewards Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple and transparent system for you to save on your education while helping your friends achieve the American dream

step1.title: Share Your Code
step1.description: Get your unique code and share with friends who want to study in the USA
step1.details: Each code automatically tracks your referrals

step2.title: Friends Sign Up
step2.description: When your friends register using your code, you both earn Matricula Coins
step2.details: 180 coins after I-20 Control Fee is paid

step3.title: Redeem Fee Discount
step3.description: Use your coins to redeem fee discounts from the Rewards Store
step3.details: Select your university and redeem the discount

step4.title: Contact Your University
step4.description: Contact your university's admissions office to apply the redeemed discount
step4.details: Present your discount code to get the reduction on your fees

referFriends.title: Refer Friends and Multiply Your Earnings

stories.name: Maria Santos
stories.text: I saved $800 on tuition just by sharing Matricula with my friends. Amazing!

stories.name: João Silva

stories.name: Ana Rodriguez
stories.text: Easy to use and really pays off. I got a discount for an entire semester!
